title: [3.3] auto update: fix custom authfiles
body:
Vendor containers/common@v0.42.3 to pull in fixes for setting custom
authfiles during auto updates.

[NO TESTS NEEDED] must be tested manually.  The main branch will receive
a new system test shortly.

BZ: bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2000943
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.3.1-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@cevich @edsantiago do you know what's going on in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11653/checks?check_run_id=3650980034? I don't understand _why/how_ there's a merge conflict.

Reproduces on my laptop. I wonder if this needs to be `v3.3.1-rhel` instead? 
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/83052484a/.cirrus.yml#L9
Thanks for checking, Ed. Testing now.
